case_title: CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH, A NON-PROFIT CORP VS. RECREATION CREATIONS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH, A NON-PROFIT CORP . AS TO DEFENDANT RECREATION CREATIONS, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-2002
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT RE: RECREATION CREATIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH, A NON-PROFIT CORP . HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH, A NON-PROFIT CORP . RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RECREATION CREATIONS, INC. $15,030.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $15,970.00 TO CEH AS SET FORTH IN CONSENT JUDGMENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $31,000.00, SEE SCANNED CONSENT JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT RE: RECREATION CREATIONS. PETITIONER APPEARED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT RE: RECREATION CREATIONS: GRANTED - NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-21-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER AND STATURORY FINDINGS APPROVING SETTLEMENT
